title: TBOI Hearts
description: Change minecraft hearts to TBOI hearts
body:
- Heart = Red Heart
- Absorbing = Gold Heart
- Frozen = Soul Heart
- Poisoned = Rotten Heart
- Withered = Black Heart
- Vehicle = Eternal Heart
- Hardcore Heart = Bone Heart
- Hardcore Absorbing = Gold Bone Heart
- Hardcore Frozen = Soul Bone Heart
- Hardcore Poisoned = Rotten Bone Heart
- Hardcore Withered = Black Bone Heart
